subcodes.first_line: Bear thou witness, in the beginning of the Religion of God, that there is no God but Him, the Lord of the worlds, and that none like unto Muhammad, His Messenger, existed before or shall exist after, throughout all creation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله المتقدر المتقدس. فاشهد فی اول الدین ان لا اله الا هو رب العالمین و ما لله مثل محمد رسول الا من قبل و لا من بعد و لا فی العالمین
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Muhammad; Islam, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God
